o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: create table appointment (id bigserial not null, end_date timestamp(6) not null, reason_for_visit varchar(100) not null, start_date timestamp(6) not null, id_user bigint not null, id_patient bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table basic_medical_history_info (label varchar(50) not null, type varchar(50) not null check (type in ('ALLERGY','GYNECO_OBSETETRIC','HYGIENE_DIETETIC','PARACLINICAL','PREVIOUSILLNESS','SEXUAL_ACTIVITY','SURGERY','UROGENITAL')), id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table consultation_item (id bigserial not null, consultation_id bigint, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table consultations (id bigserial not null, clinical_exam varchar(50) not null, conduct_to_follow varchar(50) not null, diagnosis varchar(50) not null, illness_history varchar(50) not null, note varchar(50) not null, paraclinical_exam varchar(50) not null, parameters float(53) array not null, reason_for_visit varchar(50) not null, requested_exams varchar(50) not null, patient_id bigint, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table courier (document_url varchar(50) not null, type varchar(50) not null check (type in ('PRESCRIPTION','DOCUMENT','LAB_EXAM','COURIER','REPORT')), id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table document (document_name varchar(50) not null, document_url varchar(50) not null, type varchar(50) not null check (type in ('PRESCRIPTION','DOCUMENT','LAB_EXAM','COURIER','REPORT')), id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table gyneco_obstetric (abortion varchar(50) not null, bcg boolean not null, c_section varchar(50) not null, cycle_length varchar(50) not null, cycle_nature varchar(50) not null, duration varchar(50) not null, dysmenorrhea boolean not null, dyspareunia boolean not null, endometriosis boolean not null, first_rules varchar(50) not null, geu varchar(50) not null, iud varchar(50) not null, note_anamoly varchar(50) not null, note_contraception varchar(50) not null, oral_contraceptives varchar(50) not null, pregnancy_desire varchar(50) not null, previous_pregnancies varchar(50) not null, reporting_frequency varchar(50) not null, salpingitis boolean not null, type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('ALLERGY','GYNECO_OBSETETRIC','HYGIENE_DIETETIC','PARACLINICAL','PREVIOUSILLNESS','SEXUAL_ACTIVITY','SURGERY','UROGENITAL')), urogenital_tuborculosis boolean not null, id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table lab_exam (date date not null, type varchar(50) not null check (type in ('PRESCRIPTION','DOCUMENT','LAB_EXAM','COURIER','REPORT')), id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table lab_exam_item (id bigserial not null, label varchar(255) not null, lab_exam_id bigint, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table medical_history_info (id bigserial not null, patient_id bigint, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table medication (id bigserial not null, daily_intake bigint not null, label varchar(50) not null, prescription_id bigint, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table patient (id bigserial not null, address varchar(50) not null, country varchar(255) not null check (country in ('AFGHANISTAN','AFRIQUE_DU_SUD','ALBANIE','ALGERIE','ALLEMAGNE','ANDORRE','ANGOLA','ANTIGUA_ET_BARBUDA','ARABIE_SAOUDITE','ARGENTINE','ARMENIE','AUSTRALIE','AUTRICHE','AZERBAIDJAN','BAHAMAS','BAHREIN','BANGLADESH','BARBADE','BELGIQUE','BELIZE','BENIN','BHOUTAN','BIELORUSSIE','BIRMANIE','BOLIVIE','BOSNIE_HERZEGOVINE','BOTSWANA','BRESIL','BRUNEI','BULGARIE','BURKINA_FASO','BURUNDI','CAMBODGE','CAMEROUN','CANADA','CAP_VERT','CHILI','CHINE','CHYPRE','COLOMBIE','COMORES','CONGO_BRAZZAVILLE','CONGO_KINSHASA','COREE_DU_NORD','COREE_DU_SUD','COSTA_RICA','COTE_D_IVOIRE','CROATIE','CUBA','DANEMARK','DJIBOUTI','DOMINIQUE','EGYPTE','EMIRATS_ARABES_UNIS','EQUATEUR','ERYTREE','ESPAGNE','ESTONIE','ESWATINI','ETATS_UNIS','ETHIOPIE','FIDJI','FINLANDE','FRANCE','GABON','GAMBIE','GEORGIE','GHANA','GRECE','GRENADE','GUATEMALA','GUINEE','GUINEE_EQUATORIALE','GUINEE_BISSAU','GUYANA','HAITI','HONDURAS','HONGRIE','INDE','INDONESIE','IRAK','IRAN','IRLANDE','ISLANDE','ITALIE','JAMAIQUE','JAPON','JORDANIE','KAZAKHSTAN','KENYA','KIRGHIZISTAN','KIRIBATI','KOWEIT','LAOS','LESOTHO','LETTONIE','LIBAN','LIBERIA','LIBYE','LIECHTENSTEIN','LITUANIE','LUXEMBOURG','MACEDOINE_DU_NORD','MADAGASCAR','MALAISIE','MALAWI','MALDIVES','MALI','MALTE','MAROC','MARSHALL','MAURICE','MAURITANIE','MEXIQUE','MICRONESIE','MOLDAVIE','MONACO','MONGOLIE','MONTENEGRO','MOZAMBIQUE','NAMIBIE','NAURU','NEPAL','NICARAGUA','NIGER','NIGERIA','NIUE','NORVEGE','NOUVELLE_ZELANDE','OMAN','OUGANDA','OUZBEKISTAN','PAKISTAN','PALAOS','PALESTINE','PANAMA','PAPOUASIE_NOUVELLE_GUINEE','PARAGUAY','PAYS_BAS','PEROU','PHILIPPINES','POLOGNE','PORTUGAL','QATAR','REPUBLIQUE_CENTRAFRICAINE','REPUBLIQUE_DOMINICAINE','REPUBLIQUE_TCHEQUE','ROUMANIE','ROYAUME_UNI','RUSSIE','RWANDA','SAINT_CHRISTOPHE_ET_NIEVES','SAINTE_LUCIE','SAINT_MARIN','SAINT_VINCENT_ET_LES_GRENADINES','SALOMON','SALVADOR','SAMOA','SAO_TOME_ET_PRINCIPE','SENEGAL','SERBIE','SEYCHELLES','SIERRA_LEONE','SINGAPOUR','SLOVAQUIE','SLOVENIE','SOMALIE','SOUDAN','SOUDAN_DU_SUD','SRI_LANKA','SUEDE','SUISSE','SURINAME','SYRIE','TADJIKISTAN','TANZANIE','TCHAD','THAILANDE','TIMOR_ORIENTAL','TOGO','TONGA','TRINITE_ET_TOBAGO','TUNISIE','TURKMENISTAN','TURQUIE','TUVALU','UKRAINE','URUGUAY','VANUATU','VATICAN','VENEZUELA','VIETNAM','YEMEN','ZAMBIE','ZIMBABWE')), county varchar(50) not null, date_birth date not null, department varchar(50) not null, email varchar(50) not null, family_situation varchar(255) not null check (family_situation in ('Célibataire','Marié','Divorcé','Veuf','Veuve')), father_name varchar(50) not null, first_name varchar(50) not null, last_name varchar(50) not null, mother_name varchar(50) not null, place_birth varchar(50) not null, sexe varchar(255) not null check (sexe in ('HOMME','FEMME')), tel1 varchar(15) not null, tel2 varchar(15) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table prescription (date date not null, type varchar(50) not null check (type in ('PRESCRIPTION','DOCUMENT','LAB_EXAM','COURIER','REPORT')), id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table report (document_url varchar(50) not null, type varchar(50) not null check (type in ('PRESCRIPTION','DOCUMENT','LAB_EXAM','COURIER','REPORT')), id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists patient drop constraint if exists UK_bawli8xm92f30ei6x9p3h8eju Hibernate: alter table if exists patient add constraint UK_bawli8xm92f30ei6x9p3h8eju unique (email) Hibernate: alter table if exists
